positive: A stunning and whimsical illustration of a soaring pair of mythical griffin birds, wings spread wide, flying over a stylized landscape of rolling hills and oversized flora. The composition should be centrally balanced, emphasizing the dynamic motion of the griffin and its breathtaking silhouette against a bright, pastel sunset sky. Use clean linework, strong contrast between the deep blue/purple silhouettes of the birds and the vibrant, warm gradient of the sky. Style should be a modern graphic novel aesthetic mixed with intricate tattoo flash art, ensuring high detail without excessive photorealism. The griffin should appear majestic and free. Perfect for a wearable print.
negative: blurry, low detail, amateur drawing, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, signature, watermark, artifacts, logo, copyrighted, dirty, noise, grainy
